purpose: Iteration-3 honest positive-class enrichment for Check A — pre-registered on LIVE genetics BEFORE scoring
objective_rule: GO iff (>=1 T-cell/immune GO) AND (OT T1D>T2D) AND (not GWAS-T2D-tagged) AND (measured Treg Rest score>0)

UBASH3A.biology: bona-fide T1D T-cell negative regulator (TCR signalling); classic T1D GWAS locus

ITPR3.biology: IP3 receptor; T-cell Ca2+ signalling; T1D-associated

eligibility: all 5 perturbed in Marson screen; none gold-set or axis-forbidden (verified against frozen_splits.json)
HONEST_BOUNDARY: The rule's 4th condition (measured Treg Rest direction>0) requires streaming the 16GB donor h5mu, which this kernel cannot load. So these GO labels are LIVE-GENETICS-COMPLETE but Treg-direction-PENDING. The rule-exact enriched score can only be finalized on a machine with the data (the repo .venv). Reporting this as a boundary, not skipping it.
